zh.-,73,Savoie,Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes,FRANCE,: 法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯薩伏伊
zh.lifeSummary: 當Guillaume VIII d'AUVERGNE於1095年2月25日出生在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯普-德-o可勒爾蒙吉福藍德時，他的父親Guillaume VI d'AUVERGNE27歲，母親Emma d'HAUTEVILLE "de SICILE"25歲。他於大約1130年與Anne de NEVERS在法國奧維結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1182年11月21日在他的家鄉享年87歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guillaume VIII d'AUVERGNE于1095年2月25日出生在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯普-德-o可勒爾蒙吉福藍德时，他的父亲Guillaume VI d'AUVERGNE27岁，母亲Emma d'HAUTEVILLE "de SICILE"25岁。他于大约1130年与Anne de NEVERS在法国奧維结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1182年11月21日在他的家乡享年87岁。

nameMeanings.name: Guillaume
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: VIII
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine pet form of   Vivien   and   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Guillaume VIII d'AUVERGNE was born on 25 February 1095, in Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, his father, Guillaume VI d'AUVERGNE, was 27 and his mother, Emma d'HAUTEVILLE "de SICILE", was 25. He married Anne de NEVERS about 1130, in Auvergne, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died on 21 November 1182, in his hometown, at the age of 87.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guillaume VIII d'AUVERGNE est né le 25 février 1095, à Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, son père, Guillaume VI d'AUVERGNE, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Emma d'HAUTEVILLE "de SICILE", avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Anne de NEVERS environ 1130, à Auvergne, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 21 novembre 1182, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 87 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guillaume VIII d'AUVERGNE am 25. Februar 1095 in Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guillaume VI d'AUVERGNE 27 und seine Mutter Emma d'HAUTEVILLE "de SICILE" 25. Er hat um 1130 in Auvergne, Frankreich Anne de NEVERS geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 21. November 1182 im Alter von 87 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume VIII d'AUVERGNE è nato il il 25 febbraio 1095 nel Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, il suo padre, Guillaume VI d'AUVERGNE, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Emma d'HAUTEVILLE "de SICILE", aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Anne de NEVERS circa 1130, nel Auvergne, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 21 novembre 1182, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 87 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Guillaume VIII d'AUVERGNEが1095年2月25日にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスプウイ-デ-ドoメクラーモント-フエランドで生まれた時，父Guillaume VI d'AUVERGNEは27歳，母Emma d'HAUTEVILLE "de SICILE"は25歳であった。約1130年にフランスアウバーグンでAnne de NEVERSと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1182年11月21日に故郷で87歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Guillaume VIII d'AUVERGNE(이)가 1095년 2월 25일 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 푸이-데-드o 클레몽-페랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guillaume VI d'AUVERGNE(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Emma d'HAUTEVILLE "de SICILE"(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1130년 프랑스 오버그니에서 Anne de NEVERS(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1182년 11월 21일 그의 고향에서 87세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.25 FEB 1095–21 NOV 1182: 1095 оны Хоёрдугаар сарын 25–1182 оны Арваннэгдүгээр сарын 21

pt.25 FEB 1095–21 NOV 1182: 25 de fevereiro de 1095–21 de novembro de 1182
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume VIII d'AUVERGNE nasceu em 25 de fevereiro de 1095, em Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, seu pai, Guillaume VI d'AUVERGNE, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Emma d'HAUTEVILLE "de SICILE", tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne de NEVERS aproximadamente 1130, em Auvergne, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 21 de novembro de 1182, em sua cidade natal, com 87 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guillaume VIII d'AUVERGNE родился 25 февраля 1095 г. в местности клирмонт-фирранд, пуи-де-дoм, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция, его отцу по имени Guillaume VI d'AUVERGNE было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Emma d'HAUTEVILLE "de SICILE", 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne de NEVERS около 1130 г. в местности аувиргн, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер 21 ноября 1182 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 87 лет.

es.25 FEB 1095–21 NOV 1182: 25 de febrero de 1095–21 de noviembre de 1182
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guillaume VIII d'AUVERGNE nació el 25 de febrero de 1095, en Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, su papá, Guillaume VI d'AUVERGNE, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Emma d'HAUTEVILLE "de SICILE", tenía 25 años. Se casó con Anne de NEVERS aproximadamente 1130, en Auvergne, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 21 de noviembre de 1182, en su pueblo, a la edad de 87 años.
